title: My work in Parliament - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend
text_excerpt: My work in Parliament - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon Skip to main content Mary Glindon Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend About Privacy Policy Contact Policy My work in Parliament More Menu My work in Parliament My work in Parliament is wide-ranging and includes attending debates, voting on legislation, asking questions both in writing and in the chamber, serving on committees, raising issues on behalf of constituents, meeting with ministers and stakeholders, participating in All-Party Parliamentary Groups (APPGs), campaigning on national and local issues, managing constituency casework, and attending policy briefings. You can follow the links below to view my spoken contributions in Parliament, voting record, written questions, and the Early Day Motions I have supported. My speaking contributions in Parliament Early Day Motions Written Questions Voting Record Mary Glindon Further details Promoted by Eddie Darke on behalf of Mary Glindon, both at Ruby Court, 1a Wesley Way, Newcastle, NE12 9UP You can view my privacy policy here https://maryglindon.com/privacy-policy/ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
